## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Mercury's treasury product offerings compared to JPMorgan Chase, addressing GrowthX's questions and concerns about fees, banking partners, and operational considerations.](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Mercury's treasury yield (4.03%) is slightly lower than JPM's (4.1%) due to management fees](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [GrowthX is currently with Choice Financial (Mercury partner), unaffected by Evolve Bank transition](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Mercury offers flexible FDIC insurance up to $50M through sweep networks](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Management fees fluctuate based on deposit tiers; GrowthX is in the 10-20M tier (25 basis points)](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

## Topics

### Yield Comparison: Mercury vs JPMorgan Chase

  - [JPM US Treasury Fund yield: 4.1%](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Mercury's net yield after management fee: 4.03%](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Difference: \~8 basis points (\~$10,000 annually for GrowthX's current balance)](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Mercury's management fee non-negotiable, but offers easier transfers and operations](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Banking Partners and FDIC Insurance

  - [GrowthX uses Choice Financial (Mercury partner), unaffected by Evolve Bank transition](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Mercury diversifies banking partnerships for stability (Choice, Column, others)](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [FDIC insurance up to $50M through sweep networks (previously thought to be $5M)](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Funds over $250k spread across multiple banks in $250k increments](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)

### Management Fees and Deposit Tiers

  - [Current tier (10-20M): 25 basis points management fee](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)
  - [If balance drops below 10M: Fee increases to 35 basis points](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Fees automatically adjust based on balance fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [No transfer fees for withdrawals from Mercury](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)

### Additional Services and Comparisons

  - [GrowthX plans to use RAMP for corporate credit cards due to more robust features](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [JPM offers white-labeled bill.com integration; Mercury has its own bill pay product ($35/month max)](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Morgan Stanley partnership available for larger deposits (\>$50M), with 8 basis point fee](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to create a pros/cons table for leadership review](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Decision expected within a week](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Consider Mercury for future fundraising rounds, even if not chosen now](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Explore CEO's criteria for private banking experience with JPM](https://fathom.video/share/ngmv_-cieJuKGBwu-ktjfajFuU16TLqs?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
